Brand.name: Sicily Driver Syracuse
Brand.tagline: Sicily, in a Mercedes, at your own pace.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — Sicily Driver Syracuse
meta.description: Personal data processing notice under EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR). Sicily Driver Syracuse is the data controller.

Privacy.intro: This page describes how the site ncctaxisiracusa.com handles personal data of the users who consult it. The notice is provided pursuant to Art. 13 of EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Italian Legislative Decree 196/2003 as amended.

s1.p: The data controller is Sicily Driver Siracusa (Loris Lo Russo, VAT 02150600894), with operating office in Syracuse, Italy. Email: info@ncctaxisiracusa.com — Phone: +39 375 641 3379.

s2.p: We process data you voluntarily provide by filling in the contact, tour booking or wedding quote forms: first name, last name, email address, phone number, service date, number of passengers and any additional notes. We also process navigation data automatically collected by IT systems (IP addresses, browser type, operating system, URL references, timestamps) for the sole purpose of the site's functioning and aggregated anonymous statistics.

s3.p: Data is processed to: (a) reply to quote or information requests; (b) manage booking and execution of the NCC service; (c) comply with legal obligations (invoicing, accounting); (d) improve the site through anonymous aggregated analytics, only with your explicit consent via the cookie banner.

s4.p: Processing is based on: (a) performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures at your request (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) — for booking and replies; (b) explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR) — for analytics and marketing cookies; (c) legal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR) — for invoicing and tax compliance; (d) legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR) — for technical site functioning.

s5.p: The site uses technical cookies necessary for functioning, and optional cookies (analytics and marketing) activated only with your explicit consent via the banner that appears on first visit. You can change your preferences at any time from the "Cookie settings" link at the bottom of every page. Technical cookies include: session cookie, language preference, storage of the consent itself.

s6.p: Data is not disclosed or sold to third parties. It may be communicated only to subjects involved in service delivery (e.g. partners for joint tours — Pura Vida Beach Club, Cantina Benanti, Fratelli Burgio, Palmeri — only as strictly necessary to execute the requested service) and to technical providers (Vercel hosting, email). Data is retained for the time necessary to the purposes (10 years for tax obligations, 24 months from end of relationship for communications).

s7.p: Under Articles 15–22 GDPR you have the right to: access your data, request its correction or deletion, restrict processing, object to processing, receive data in a structured format (portability), withdraw consent at any time. To exercise your rights write to info@ncctaxisiracusa.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (www.garanteprivacy.it).

s8.p: We may update this notice to reflect regulatory or operational changes. The date of the last update is shown at the top of the page. We invite you to consult it periodically.

contact.body: For any request regarding personal data processing write to us at

Cookie.title: We use cookies to improve your experience.
Cookie.body: Strictly necessary cookies are always on. Analytics and marketing only with your consent.

settings.title: Choose what to enable.
settings.body: You can change your mind anytime from the "Cookie settings" link at the bottom of every page.

necessary.name: Necessary
necessary.description: Technical cookies for the site to work (session, language preference, cookie consent). Without these the site doesn't function. You cannot disable them.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous cookies to understand how you use the site (page views, device, duration). They help us improve navigation. Data does not identify the person.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: Cookies to measure clicks on our advertising campaigns. Enable only if you arrived from an ad and we'd like to know which one.

meta.title: Sicily Driver Syracuse — Private NCC, Taxi & Airport Transfers in Sicily
meta.description: Private NCC service in Syracuse: airport transfers from Catania, Comiso, Pozzallo. Baroque, Etna and Ortigia tours with English-speaking Mercedes drivers. 24/7 WhatsApp booking.

hero.a11yLabel: Sicily Driver Syracuse — private guide for eastern Sicily
hero.subhead: Airport transfers, private tours and chauffeur services. Mercedes V-Class and tailor-made fleet, in English or Italian, 24/7.

whisper1.text: We pick you up wherever you are. From there, we decide together where to go.

esperienze.card1Body: An exclusive vintage Fiat 500 Spiaggina, a tour around Ortigia island, stops at the most iconic monuments, scenic photos and a seaside aperitif.
esperienze.card2Body: From the port of Ortigia toward the most beautiful bays of the coast. Wind, sun, a swim stop, Fratelli Burgio platter on board. Engine off when the wind’s there.
esperienze.card3Tag: South coast · full day · Pura Vida Beach Club
esperienze.card3Body: The south-eastern tip of the island, where the Ionian meets the Mediterranean. Lunch at Pura Vida, sunset on the sea, aperitivo in Marzamemi before the return.
esperienze.card4Tag: Etna · full day · quad and wineries
esperienze.card4Body: The Silvestri craters by quad, two partner wineries (Benanti and Palmeri) for the tasting, lunch at the winery with a view of the vineyards that grow on lava.
esperienze.card5Body: Noto, Modica, Ragusa Ibla. Baroque limestone in the morning light, cold-processed chocolate, terraces over the valleys. With the pauses that count.
esperienze.customTagline: Looking for something different? We build the itinerary together.

manifesto.h2: Private transfers, tours, events. All across Sicily.
manifesto.body1: Sicily Driver Syracuse is your partner for chauffeur-driven car services (NCC) across the whole of Sicily. We offer private transfers to and from all the island’s airports — Catania, Comiso, Palermo and Trapani — as well as connections to the ports of Pozzallo and Augusta. Travel in maximum comfort aboard our Mercedes V-Class, GLB Premium and E-Class, 24 hours a day.
manifesto.body2: Our bespoke tours reach the Baroque of Noto, Modica and Ragusa Ibla, the lunar landscapes of Etna, ancient Ortigia and the terraces of Taormina. The dedicated service is designed for weddings, corporate events and tailor-made travel.

interni.body: The cars are Mercedes V-Class, GLB Premium or E-Class. Weekly mechanical checks, sanitised after every service, cold water on board, Wi-Fi on request. People spend hours in the car: we make sure those hours feel quiet.
interni.waterAlt: Water bottle in the rear cup holder of the Mercedes V-Class
interni.screenAlt: Wi-Fi tablet on the headrest of the Mercedes V-Class
interni.caption: The journey begins the moment you open the door. Even the long hours, between Catania and Marzamemi, pass lightly.

mosaico.ragusaAlt: Cupola of San Giorgio Cathedral in Ragusa Ibla
mosaico.taorminaAlt: Greek theatre of Taormina with sea view

partners.subhead: We don’t work with everyone. Each partner adds something we couldn’t offer alone — a flavour, a wait in the right place, a story.
partners.puravidaQuote: They know how to stay quiet when a guest just wants to look at the sea for three hours.
partners.puravidaBody: Beach club facing Isola delle Correnti, where the two seas meet. Sicilian cuisine on the sand, light wooden sunbeds, access to crystalline water.
partners.puravidaAlt: View of Pura Vida Beach Club at sunset
partners.burgioQuote: Every product has a producer’s name behind it. Not an industrial label.
partners.burgioBody: Historic gourmet shop in Ortigia. Cured meats, cheeses, preserves, fresh bread. The platters served on board the Silent Sailing are born here.
partners.burgioAlt: Platter of Sicilian cured meats and cheeses from Fratelli Burgio
partners.benantiQuote: They have been making wine for four generations on Etna lava. For us they are always the starting point.
partners.benantiBody: One of the historic voices in Etna’s renaissance as a high-quality terroir. Nerello Mascalese and Carricante grown between 600 and 900 metres on volcanic soils.
partners.benantiAlt: Glass of Etna red wine from Cantina Benanti
partners.palmeriQuote: The other Etna. The one you tell to those who really want to listen.
partners.palmeriBody: South-eastern slope of Etna, less touristic than the historic ones to the north. A small family operation, wines that speak of a precise area.
partners.palmeriAlt: Oak barrels in the Palmeri winery on Etna

listino.cataniaSiracusaNote: One-hour drive, Mercedes V-Class, flight tracking, child seats free.
listino.cataniaTaorminaNote: One hour along the Ionian coast, comfortable even at night.
listino.cataniaNotoNote: One hour twenty, airport wait included.
listino.pozzalloSiracusaNote: One hour, for those landing off the Malta ferry.
listino.disclaimer: The rest we tell you on WhatsApp, in five minutes. Prices may vary for time, season and party size. Confirmed at quote, no surprises on return.

dietro.body1: Sicily Driver Syracuse is a family business with three bases in Syracuse, Noto and Marzamemi. A Mercedes fleet that grows step by step, checked every week.
dietro.body2: The drivers speak fluent Italian and English — most have lived or worked abroad. They know the roads, where the palaces no guidebook mentions are, and where to actually eat well.
dietro.body3: From Catania to Marzamemi we don’t take shortcuts. We drive you where you need to go, we wait if the flight is late, we know where to stop for the right photos.
dietro.alt: Mercedes driver parked on a Val di Noto road at sunset

items.quote: They came on time at four in the morning. They waited for the late flight without a fuss. They recommended a restaurant in Ortigia that wasn’t in any guide. For us it was the first Sicily.
items.author: Marco & Elisa

items.quote: Baroque tour with two small kids. The driver brought car seats, water, and infinite patience. He dropped us at the chocolate workshop in Modica without rushing. Never once felt the ‘we have to go’ vibe.
items.author: Sophie Laurent

items.quote: A full day on Etna for two. Quad on the craters, lunch at the Benanti winery. Salvatore’s English is excellent and he talks about lava like it’s a relative. Worth every euro.
items.author: James Walker

items.quote: Booked a sunset in Marzamemi the night before — replied on WhatsApp in twenty minutes. Brand-new Mercedes, beautifully kept, driver in a jacket. Service level worthy of Capri, but with real substance.
items.author: Anna & Pietro

items.quote: Wedding in Val di Noto, three cars for our guests. Timings respected to the minute, drivers in ties, photos of guests during the journey. Our relatives felt pampered.
items.author: David & Mira

items.quote: Silent Sailing at sunset. Professional skipper, the Burgio platter served on a wooden tray, Etna white wine. Four hours where we didn’t touch our phones. That’s rare.
items.author: Federica Ronzano

ctaFinale.body: WhatsApp is the fastest channel. We reply within an hour, 24 hours a day, even in winter.

meta.title: NCC Services Sicily · Transfers, Tours, Weddings | Sicily Driver
meta.description: Our services at Sicily Driver Syracuse: airport transfers, private tours, weddings and events, business. Mercedes with English-speaking driver, 24/7 across eastern Sicily.

hero.subhead: Premium vehicles, professional drivers and tailor-made itineraries to explore Sicily in total comfort.

intro.body: At Sicily Driver Syracuse we offer four ways of being driven around eastern Sicily, with the same Mercedes fleet and the same chauffeurs throughout: point-to-point airport transfers, private day tours, wedding and event service, business solutions for companies and VIP guests.

cards.card1Body: Catania, Comiso, Palermo, Trapani. Pozzallo and Augusta. From €80 per route in Mercedes V-Class.
cards.card1Point3: Child seats at no extra cost
cards.card2Body: Baroque, Etna, Ortigia + Taormina. Tours customised on request. 6–9 hours with bespoke stops.
cards.card3Body: A dedicated fleet for the big day. V-Class for guests, E-Class for the couple.
cards.card4Body: Corporate transfers, conferences, VIP guests. Standard and electronic invoicing.
cards.card4Point3: Driver in jacket for formal occasions

fleet.card1Model: V-Class — the workhorse of the fleet
fleet.card1Comfort: Leather, AC, tinted windows, Wi-Fi on request
fleet.card2Comfort: High ride, panoramic, ideal for tours

areas.cities: Catania (and Fontanarossa), Taormina and Isola Bella, Ragusa Ibla, Modica, Comiso (and airport), Augusta, Pozzallo (cruise port), Avola, Pachino, Portopalo, the whole Val di Noto.
areas.airports: Airports: Catania Fontanarossa, Comiso, Palermo Falcone Borsellino, Trapani Birgi.

faq.q1: How much advance notice do you need?
faq.a1: For airport transfers, a WhatsApp message even 2 hours before is fine. For tours and weddings we recommend 7–15 days in advance to secure the right fleet.
faq.q2: Do you cover all of Sicily or only the east?
faq.a2: We operate primarily in eastern Sicily (provinces of Syracuse, Catania, Ragusa, southern Messina). For central or western Sicily we organise with more notice.
faq.q3: Only point-to-point transfers or hourly hire as well?
faq.a3: Both: point-to-point transfers and hourly hire (half day, full day) with car and driver at your disposal.
faq.q4: Can we pay by bank transfer in advance?
faq.a4: Yes, this is the preferred method for weddings, events, business and tours booked in advance. Cash and card accepted on board for transfers.

ctaFinale.subhead: Three ways to tell us what service you need.

meta.title: About · The story of Sicily Driver Syracuse | NCC Sicily
meta.description: Sicily Driver Syracuse was born from a passion for high-quality NCC services. Three bases (Syracuse, Noto, Marzamemi), a curated Mercedes fleet, English-speaking drivers.

hero.subhead: Three bases, a Mercedes fleet looked after like family, drivers who speak real English — not Google Translate English.

story.body1: Sicily Driver Syracuse is a young and dynamic company born from a passion for high-quality NCC and transfer services. With extensive experience in crafting personalised journeys, we provide tailored solutions for individuals and businesses seeking comfort and safety in their travels.
story.body2: Thanks to our carefully selected fleet and attention to detail, we guarantee punctuality and courtesy on every trip. Our team consists of transportation professionals who understand the specific needs of our clients, ready to support you 24/7 throughout your journey.
story.body3: Choosing Sicily Driver Syracuse means trusting a dedicated partner: from airport transfers and NCC services for events to private excursions and tours. We are by your side to make every journey enjoyable and worry-free.

beliefs.item1Body: From Catania to Marzamemi, fare agreed before departure. No hidden surcharges, no mysterious 'night rate'.
beliefs.item2Body: V-Class, GLB Premium, E-Class. Weekly mechanical checks, sanitised after every service. Cold water on board, always.
beliefs.item3Body: Our chauffeurs speak fluent Italian and English. They know the roads, the mass times in Modica, and where to actually eat well in Ortigia.

bases.base2Note: Operations base for Val di Noto tours
bases.base3Note: Support base for the south-east coast

ctaFinale.subhead: Three ways to tell us where to pick you up.

meta.title: Contact · Sicily Driver Syracuse | Phone, WhatsApp, email
meta.description: Contact Sicily Driver Syracuse: phone +39 375 641 3379, WhatsApp 24/7, email info@ncctaxisiracusa.com. Bases in Syracuse, Noto, Marzamemi.

hero.subhead: In Italian or English, via WhatsApp, phone or email. We reply within one hour, 24 hours a day.

ways.card1Note: Send us date, route and passenger count.
ways.card2Note: For urgent matters, imminent travel, last-minute confirmations.
ways.card3Note: For detailed requests, weddings, business, invoicing.

form.subhead: Write in your own language: English, Italian or any other. We reply within 24-36 hours. For urgencies, WhatsApp 24/7.
form.fieldMessagePlaceholder: When, from where, to where, how many people, any specific needs...
form.submitNote: We reply within 24-36 hours. For urgent requests, message us on WhatsApp.
form.successBody: We will reply within 24-36 hours. If it is urgent, message us on WhatsApp.
form.errorRequired: Please check the required fields and try again.
form.fieldSubjectPlaceholder: E.g. Catania-Syracuse transfer, Etna Tour, Wedding...

times.body: WhatsApp: within 1 hour, 24/7, including nights and holidays. Email: within 24 hours. Phone: always, around the clock.
times.businessNote: Weddings and events need a detailed quote: the first reply arrives within an hour with initial sizing, the full quote within 24 hours.
